title: AST Domestic Disturbance: Huslia [AK25074212]
summary: On July 26, 2025, at approximately 1657 hours, Tribal Police Officer (TPO) Arce in Huslia reported a domestic disturbance. Charges on 30-year-old Kevin Albert for assault in the fourth degree and assault in the presence of a child have been sent to the district attorney office.

title: AST DWLR: Fairbanks [AK25076298]
summary: On 07/31/25 at approximately 2354 hours, Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle on the Mitchell Expressway for speeding. The driver, Shelby Dewey-Davidson 21 YOA, was driving in while her Alaska OLN was revoked for DUI. Dewey-Davidson was issued a summons and released.
